context: Tests whether the App Intents skill guidance is applied to Spotlight indexing and IndexedEntity production architecture.

checklist.name: Entity property metadata
checklist.description: Uses AppEntity property metadata with `@Property(title:indexingKey:)`, `@Property(indexingKey:)`, or `@ComputedProperty(indexingKey:)` for entity-exposed searchable fields. Award full credit when the answer treats display titles as useful labels but not as a substitute for Spotlight `indexingKey` metadata, and avoids duplicating ordinary entity metadata only in Core Spotlight attributes.

checklist.name: Key-path indexing keys
checklist.description: Shows or describes indexing keys as key paths such as `\.title` or `\.contentDescription` instead of bare enum cases, strings, or unsupported property names.

checklist.name: Named production index
checklist.description: Recommends a named `CSSearchableIndex` for production AppEntity indexing and avoids presenting `CSSearchableIndex.default()` as the production path.

checklist.name: Default attribute set
checklist.description: Explains that a custom `attributeSet` replaces the default AppEntity-derived attributes and should start from or preserve `defaultAttributeSet` when display representation and property metadata should remain searchable.

checklist.name: Duplicate indexing boundary
checklist.description: Avoids indexing the same records through both `indexAppEntities` and a separate `CSSearchableItem` pipeline. Award full credit if the answer either chooses the AppEntity path or says an existing item pipeline should use `associateAppEntity(_:priority:)` instead.

checklist.name: Opening path
checklist.description: Includes an explicit route for opening results, such as an `OpenIntent` or equivalent app navigation path, rather than relying on a generic launch screen to infer the recipe.

checklist.name: Stable IDs and query behavior
checklist.description: Requires stable persistent entity identifiers and an `EntityQuery.entities(for:)` implementation that returns only entities that still exist for the requested IDs.

checklist.name: Update and delete lifecycle
checklist.description: Recommends incremental updates and deletes in the same named Spotlight index, with batching or client-state recovery when appropriate, rather than a blocking blind reindex on every launch.
